team_name: Nyayasetu - AI-Powered Judgment Intelligence Platform for Government Compliance
summary: Build an AI system that automates the process of reading court judgment PDFs, extracting key information, generating a structured action plan, and ensuring human-verified data is presented in a dashboard for government use.
key_steps: Automatic extraction of case details, key directions, parties involved, and timelines
Sorting verified action plans by deadline urgency
optimization_claims: Multi-step extraction for more consistent results
Large context window handles full judgment in one pass
Ensemble consistency check catches high-confidence hallucinations
constraints_addressed: Focus on decision support, not full automation
